command: uv run python scripts/audit_d5_corpus.py --corpus-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d5_balanced/corpus.jsonl --near-duplicate-hamming-threshold 3 --near-duplicate-min-bytes 200 --output results/D5_corpus_audit.json --experiment-id D5_corpus_audit --seed 123
notes: Audit-only pass over the existing materialized D5 JSONL. It does not download data, mutate corpus rows, or make temporal-holdout claims.
